chapter_title.en: Chapter on What is Permissible and Impermissible to Wear in the State of Ihram

text: 2628 - وَ مَرَّ أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : بِامْرَأَةٍ مُحْرِمَةٍ قَدِ اِسْتَتَرَتْ بِمِرْوَحَةٍ فَأَمَاطَ اَلْمِرْوَحَةَ بِقَضِيبِهِ عَنْ وَجْهِهَا.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.2628 - Abu Ja'far (as) passed by a woman in Ihram who had covered her face with a fan. He moved the fan away from her face with his staff.
